This row was added as a distinct header 'Recepta' based on visual inspection. gpt-5-mini correctly identified a header here ('Receipts') but gemini-flash merged this text with the following total line's description. The script is 'Recepta'.

Amounts (400 pounds, 7 shillings, 0 pence, 0.25 fraction) confirmed visually from image (matching gemini-flash for amounts). The 'q' symbol clearly indicates a farthing. The description is 'Summa Total', the 'Recepta' is a header on the line above this amount. gpt-5-mini's amounts and description were both significantly incorrect.

Amounts are in consensus. Description 'Solutares Summa Total' confirmed visually (gemini-flash) despite being slightly faded. gpt-5-mini's description was different and associated with the next line in gemini-flash's indexing.

Description 'Summa Omnium Dispenso' confirmed visually (gemini-flash). Amounts for pounds and shillings are in consensus. For pence, the image clearly shows '2' followed by a 'q' symbol (farthing), confirming 2 pence and 0.25 fraction (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini's justification for '11' pence was based on arithmetic consistency with its own incorrect prior readings, which is unreliable. Visual reading takes precedence here.
